title: My phone wallpaper
summary: Describe the image on your phone wallpaper and explain why you chose it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about your phone wallpaper. Describe what the image shows, what colors it has, and why you chose it. Use present simple and simple adjectives.
hintStarters: My phone wallpaper is a photo of…
The colors in the image are…
Every time I look at my phone, I…
sampleText: My phone wallpaper is a photo of a mountain lake in Canada. I took this photo last summer when I was on a hiking trip near Vancouver. The lake is very still and the water looks dark blue and green. There are tall pine trees on both sides. The sky is light pink because the photo was taken at sunset. I love the colors in this photo. They are calm and beautiful. Every time I look at my phone, I feel relaxed for a moment. My phone is always with me, so this image reminds me of nature and open spaces. I live in a busy city, so I need this small moment of calm. I do not change my wallpaper very often. I changed it once last year, but I always come back to this lake photo. My friends sometimes ask where the lake is. When I tell them, they want to go there too. This photo makes the city feel a little smaller.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: cảm thấy thư giãn trong một khoảnh khắc
nhắc tôi nhớ đến thiên nhiên

sampleAnnotations.phrase: come back to this lake photo
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: quay lại tấm ảnh hồ này

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple for a specific past event
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng quá khứ đơn cho sự kiện trong quá khứ: 'I took this photo last summer', 'I changed it once last year'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the past simple for completed events: 'I took this photo last summer when I was on a hiking trip'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Verb 'remind' + 'of'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'remind somebody of something' = nhắc ai nhớ điều gì: 'this image reminds me of nature'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'remind + object + of': 'this image reminds me of nature and open spaces'.

sampleTranslationVi: Hình nền điện thoại của tôi là một bức ảnh về hồ núi ở Canada. Tôi chụp ảnh này mùa hè năm ngoái khi đi bộ đường dài gần Vancouver. Hồ rất tĩnh lặng và nước trông xanh đậm và xanh lá cây. Có những cây thông cao ở cả hai bên. Bầu trời màu hồng nhạt vì ảnh được chụp lúc hoàng hôn. Tôi yêu những màu sắc trong tấm ảnh này. Chúng thật yên bình và đẹp. Mỗi khi nhìn vào điện thoại, tôi cảm thấy thư giãn trong một khoảnh khắc. Điện thoại lúc nào cũng ở bên tôi, vì vậy hình ảnh này nhắc tôi nhớ đến thiên nhiên và không gian rộng mở. Tôi sống ở một thành phố bận rộn nên tôi cần khoảnh khắc bình yên nhỏ này. Tôi không thay đổi hình nền thường xuyên. Tôi đổi nó một lần năm ngoái, nhưng luôn quay lại tấm ảnh hồ này. Bạn bè đôi khi hỏi hồ ở đâu. Khi tôi kể cho họ biết, họ muốn đến đó. Tấm ảnh này khiến thành phố cảm thấy nhỏ hơn một chút.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the phone wallpaper show?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'My phone wallpaper is a photo of a mountain lake in Canada'.

mcQuestions.prompt: When did the writer take the photo?
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the time phrase in the second sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why is the sky light pink in the photo?
options: The photo was taken at sunset.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'the sky is light pink because the photo was taken at sunset'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer feel when looking at the wallpaper?
Why does the writer keep this wallpaper instead of changing it?
options: Because they do not know how to change it.
Because it reminds them of nature and open spaces.
Because a friend made it for them.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'this image reminds me of nature and open spaces'.
mcQuestions.hint: The explanation is in the middle of the text.

options: This photo reminds me of nature.
This photo remember me of nature.
This photo remembers nature to me.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'remind + object + of' is the correct structure.
mcQuestions.hint: A preposition is needed after 'remind me'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What color is the water in the photo?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'the water looks dark blue and green'.

mcQuestions.prompt: How often does the writer change their wallpaper?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I do not change my wallpaper very often'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses the past simple correctly?
options: I take this photo last summer.
I am taking this photo last summer.
I took this photo last summer.
I have taken this photo last summer.
mcQuestions.hint: Past simple for a completed action in the past.

mcQuestions.prompt: What do the writer's friends want to do after they hear about the lake?
options: See the photo on the phone.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'When I tell them, they want to go there too'.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people choose nature images as their phone wallpapers when they live in cities?
